page: Microsoft Azure NP20s is an x86_64 architecture server instance belonging to the NPS family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 20 dedicated vCPUs powered by an Intel processor, paired with 336.0 GB of system memory. This configuration yields a high memory-to-core ratio of 16.8 GB per vCPU, positioning the instance within the memory-optimized hardware class.

The instance includes 1509 GB of local storage and is designated as Premium Storage capable, allowing for high-throughput disk configurations. It does not include bundled GPUs or complimentary public IPv4 addresses. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures consistent processing capabilities without resource contention from neighboring virtual machines.

From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the NP20s offers high memory density relative to its vCPU count, making it suitable for workloads that require large in-memory datasets without needing a proportional increase in compute cores. This resource profile is appropriate for memory-intensive applications, large-scale databases, in-memory caching layers, and enterprise resource planning systems.
description: Microsoft Azure NP20s is an x86_64 server instance within the NPS family, operating on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It is equipped with 20 dedicated vCPUs from an Intel processor and 336.0 GB of system memory, providing a high resource density of 16.8 GB of RAM per core. The instance features 1509 GB of local storage with Premium Storage capability, though it lacks integrated GPU hardware and complimentary public IPv4 addresses. Designed for memory-intensive workloads, the NP20s provides dedicated CPU allocation to ensure stable performance. This hardware profile is suited for large-scale databases, in-memory caching, and enterprise applications requiring substantial memory capacity relative to compute resources.
og_description: Microsoft Azure NP20s is an x86_64 memory-optimized server featuring 20 dedicated Intel vCPUs, 336 GB of RAM, and 1509 GB of Premium Storage capable local storage, running on Hyper-V.

tagline: A memory-optimized x86_64 server featuring high RAM-to-vCPU density and premium local storage for demanding database workloads.

336.0 GB of system memory providing 16.8 GB per core
1509 GB of local storage with Premium Storage capability
